chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3605 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِيَّاكُمْ وَ مُخَالَطَةَ اَلسَّفِلَةِ، فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَئُولُ إِلَى خَيْرٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3605 - Imam (as) said: "Beware of associating with the lowly, for it does not lead to any good."
